stemHtml: Having interrupted the Captain for a sound reason, the Co-pilot should…

options.a: remind him/her of his/her last action before the interruption.
options.b: apologise for interrupting him/her at a critical stage of flight.
options.c: ensure there is no ATC traffic on the radio that may be causing a possible distraction before continuing.
options.d: repeat the interruption twice so that the Captain’s attention is focussed on the new information.
